description.en: In 1997, Sepp Hochreiter and Juergen Schmidhuber proposed Long Short-Term Memory networks. LSTM introduced gates that preserve long-range information flow, helping recurrent networks overcome vanishing gradients and enabling later breakthroughs in speech and language.
description.zh: 1997年，霍赫赖特与施密德胡伯提出了长短期记忆网络（LSTM），通过引入门控机制 保持长距离信息流，用以解决RNN的梯度消失困境。 导数：与遗忘门Ft有关，接近于1

subcaption.zh: LSTM与门控机制 架构图
